research_gate: GP4 is verified and complete through registered run-7e5c44dc8f48424a8cec42da756e3127; the typed closeout receipt binds exact C3A, C4V and GP0-GP4 proof references and grants no successor authority.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized bounded G1 vertical closeout evidence receipt only; broad_g1=false; runtime_selected=false; runtime_containment_pending=true; evidence_only=true; promotion_authority=false. No runtime, broad C4, C3B, Companion, Greenfield, procedural generation, persistence expansion, filesystem, network, process or Kernel mutation.
context_health: Registered complete gate run-7e5c44dc8f48424a8cec42da756e3127 passed in 590582 ms; typed deterministic closeout receipt is recorded; broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain gated.

macro_findings: GP4 is verified and complete after focused, workspace and registered complete-gate evidence.
The typed canonical receipt binds the exact deterministic bundle, ordered dependency proofs and registered successful run.
The recorded closeout is evidence only and grants no runtime, promotion or broad G1 authority.
Broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain unchanged and gated.
micro_findings: C4V already authenticates the exact C3A input and packet and reconstructs return state by semantic replay rather than deserialization trust.
GP2 emissions require exact replay-validated terminal GP1 state and history; GP4 may embed exact outputs but cannot synthesize progression.
GP3 exposes authenticated fixed situation, approach, consequence and optional nonterminal threat references.
GP4 needs a separate isolated module with an 8 MiB bundle ceiling and strict nested validation before canonical equality.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: The closeout records existing semantic evidence only; no visual asset, renderer or creative-quality claim is used.

tiers_completed.result: The owner-authorized boundary fixes one Signal Anchor temporary-rescue bundle, exact dual-world replay semantics, dependency references, return/restart and runtime nonclaims.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: A future worker could mistake the bounded evidence receipt for broad G1 closure or runtime-selection authority.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Retain one exact machine-verifiable completion boundary for the proven Signal Anchor vertical.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: Recorded; no further execution is authorized in this package.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No engine, runtime implementation or promotion, broad C4, C3B, Companion, Greenfield, procedural generation, persistence expansion, filesystem, network, process or Kernel mutation.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Receipt recorded; wait for an owner-authorized successor.

exit_criteria.label: One exact C3A-backed C4V run and one authority-lowering authored shadow replay share a digest covering every BaseLoopState field except world_context.
The bundle binds real C4V receipts and snapshots, exact GP3 situation/approach/threat references and exact GP2 emissions without invented labels or digests.
C4V return and final restart reproduce exact semantics while presentation/accessibility remain neutral slots and adapter/performance requirements remain explicitly unmeasured.
A strict bundle no larger than 8 MiB survives hostile decoding and produces a G1-VERTICAL-CLOSEOUT receipt without broad G1 closure or runtime promotion.

unresolved_risks: A future successor could confuse this bounded evidence-only receipt with broad G1 closure or runtime promotion.
Runtime containment remains pending and requires a separate owner-authorized successor.
